'''âb-s-f-z''' ('''kabasfezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wall|wall]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-s-f-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wall|wall]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-s-f-z
|-
! Lemma
| kabasfezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibasfezoko|thibasfezoko]] || [[word:jibasfezoko|jibasfezoko]] || [[word:shibasfezoko|shibasfezoko]] || [[word:kibasfezoko|kibasfezoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
